title: Explanations of schizophrenia
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Clinical — biological, psychological, and sociocultural explanations of schizophrenia.
learningObjectives: Outline family dysfunction and cognitive explanations.

simpleExplanation.title: Why schizophrenia happens
simpleExplanation.summary: Explanations range from genes and dopamine to stressful family environments — most accounts now combine biological vulnerability with environmental triggers.

sections.content: **Schizophrenia explanations** (1.1.2) — compare **biological vs psychological** and use **studies** (Gottesman, Tienari).
